---
image: img.png
title: Accuracy of automatic emotion recognition from voice
author: Damien Dupré & Gary J McKeown
description: Conference of the International Society for Research on Emotion (ISRE
  2019)
date: '2019-07-11'
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: jolla
  image-shape: rounded
---

::: {#hero-heading}

Conference of the International Society for Research on Emotion (ISRE 2019)

:::
